object.name: Community
object.description: Represents a community (a group of chats).
object.rst_description: Represents a community (a group of chats).

annotations.description: Unique identifier for this community. This number may have more than 32 significant bits and some programming languages may have difficulty/silent defects in interpreting it. But it has at most 52 significant bits, so a signed 64-bit integer or double-precision float type are safe for storing this identifier.
